holdings.infoBox: TCAL is an equity ETF with a total of 194 individual holdings. The top holdings are Waters stock at 1.91%, Danaher at 1.91%, AMETEK at 1.82%, McDonald's at 1.75%, and Waste Connections at 1.70%.

overview.description: The T. Rowe Price Capital Appreciation Premium Income ETF (TCAL) is an exchange-traded fund. The ETF currently has 270.29m in AUM and 94 holdings. TCAL is actively managed, utilizing a covered call options strategy with US stocks TCAL was launched on Mar 26, 2025 and is issued by T. Rowe Price.
